message:
feat(fleet,security): add config-driven fleet agent with graceful shutdown, real registry actions, and SSRF enforcement wiring

Fleet agent rewrite (cli.rs, config.rs, main.rs):
- Fleet CLI args refactored: node_id and poll_interval_secs become
  Option with fallback to FleetConfig values from TOML/env
- Add --once flag for single-poll-then-exit mode
- Add --lockstep-preflight flag on run command for pre-execution
  fleet policy synchronization
- Add fleet.node_id and fleet.poll_interval_seconds to FleetConfig
  with FRANKEN_NODE_FLEET_NODE_ID / _POLL_INTERVAL_SECONDS env override
  support and validation
- Extract resolve_fleet_agent_args() for config+CLI merge
- Install ctrlc-based graceful shutdown via install_fleet_agent_shutdown_flag()
- Fleet agent now actually mutates the local trust-card registry:
  apply_fleet_quarantine_action() and apply_fleet_release_action()
  with timestamp-based action ordering
- Add sleep_until_next_fleet_poll() with shutdown-flag awareness

Security (config.rs, engine_dispatcher.rs, degraded_mode_policy.rs):
- Add SsrfEnforcementMode enum (none/monitor/block) to NetworkPolicyConfig
- Wire FRANKEN_ENGINE_NETWORK_SSRF_ENFORCEMENT env var to spawned engine
- Add network_policy to SecurityConfig test fixtures

BuildContext refactoring (main.rs):
- Refactor BuildContext tests to use detect_with_env() with explicit
  env maps, eliminating global env::set_var mutation
- Add registry tests for manifest SHA-256 hash verification, atomic
  writes, archived artifact exclusion, hash-mismatch and
  invalid-signature integrity status

Fleet E2E tests (fleet_cli_e2e.rs, +539 lines):
- --once mode single poll test
- Quarantine applies to local registry
- Release clears quarantine (same cycle and cross-cycle)
- Timestamp-based action ordering with lower-lexicographic ID tiebreak
- Config-driven node_id/poll_interval verification
- SIGTERM graceful shutdown test

Dependencies:
- Add ctrlc = "3" for signal handling

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -140,6 +140,12 @@ pub struct RunArgs {
     /// Explicit franken_engine binary path or command name.
     #[arg(long)]
     pub engine_bin: Option<PathBuf>,
+
+    /// Run lockstep comparison across runtimes before execution.
+    /// When enabled, the app is run in both node and bun (if available)
+    /// and results are compared. Divergence blocks execution.
+    #[arg(long)]
+    pub lockstep_preflight: bool,
 }
 
 // -- migrate --
